narrative:
Royalton / Lyons (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,049 registered voters, with 53.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.4 percentage points.
